nodes.label: AI as inspiration source
nodes.grounding_span: It is okay to use AI for inspiration, but not to do your work for you.

nodes.label: AI as business planning tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I implement AI tools in planning and organizing social media posts and scheduling.

nodes.label: Personal nature of creative work
nodes.grounding_span: Since my field is one that is highly personal, AI is not a threat.

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and ownership
nodes.grounding_span: I was just using the AI as a helping tool, and not to make the design for me.

nodes.label: Business efficiency and strategic planning
nodes.grounding_span: I plan designs further in advance and am typically operating on a 8/12 week out schedule.

nodes.label: Comfort with AI as helper
nodes.grounding_span: I felt okay with this because I was just using the AI as a helping tool.

nodes.label: Concern about improper AI use by others
nodes.grounding_span: I do not think that other feel the same way and I think lines will continue to be blurred.

nodes.label: Proactive strategic planning
nodes.grounding_span: I plan designs further in advance and am typically operating on a 8/12 week out schedule.

nodes.label: Boundary-setting around creative agency
nodes.grounding_span: I lead the creative process primarily.
